Tests watch information display on Pebble devices and includes build scripts and metadata.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Tests watch information display, including version, color, and model, on a Pebble device.
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: Tests for the `watch_info_test` app using the PebbleAppTest framework.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Ignores build-generated files in the watch_info_test directory.
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "watch_info_test" app, including UUID, version, and company information.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
